mapper.select: SELECT gb.id, gb.user_id, gb.content, gb.status, gb.is_anonymous, gb.is_featured, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS nickname, u.avatar, 0 AS can_delete, gb.create_time, gb.update_time FROM guest_book gb LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = gb.user_id WHERE gb.status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY gb.create_time DESC, gb.id DESC

SELECT gb.id, gb.user_id, gb.content, gb.status, gb.is_anonymous, gb.is_featured, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS nickname, u.avatar, gb.create_time, gb.update_time FROM guest_book gb LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = gb.user_id WHERE gb.status IN (0, 1) AND gb.is_featured = 1 ORDER BY gb.create_time DESC, gb.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guest_book (user_id, content, status, is_anonymous) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{isAnonymous})
